ideas.name: 健身记录
ideas.desc: 记录运动数据，追踪健身进度
ideas.desc_en: Log workout data, track fitness progress
ideas.desc_ja: 運動データ記録、フィットネス進捗追跡
ideas.desc_ko: 운동 데이터 기록, 피트니스 진행 추적
ideas.detail:
实现：运动录入 → 数据分析 → 进度图表
场景：健身爱好者、减肥追踪
技术：Python + 数据库 + 可视化
ideas.detail_en:
Approach: Workout entry → Data analysis → Progress charts
Use cases: Fitness enthusiasts, weight loss tracking
Tech: Python + Database + Visualization

Approach: Diet entry → Nutrient calculation → Analysis report
Use cases: Healthy eating, weight management
Tech: Python + Nutrition DB + Data analysis
